context: Tests whether the agent implements post-purchase account creation correctly: validating and expiring the token, linking all historical guest orders to the new account, deleting the token after use, enforcing a minimum password length, providing a skip option, and implementing guest order tracking without requiring login.

checklist.name: Token expiry checked
checklist.description: The createAccountFromOrder handler checks record.expiresAt < new Date() (or equivalent) and returns an error response (4xx) when the token is expired or missing

checklist.name: Token deleted after use
checklist.description: After successfully creating the account, the token record is deleted (or marked used) from the accountCreationTokens table — it is not left in place for potential reuse

checklist.name: All guest orders linked
checklist.description: On account creation, ALL orders where guestEmail matches the token's email AND userId is null are updated to set userId to the new user's ID — not just the single order from the token

checklist.name: Duplicate account check
checklist.description: The handler checks whether an account with the same email already exists and returns a 409 (or similar conflict) error if so, rather than creating a duplicate account

checklist.name: Password min length 8 UI
checklist.description: The password input in OrderConfirmationPage.jsx has minLength={8} (or equivalent attribute) and the Create Account button is disabled when password.length < 8

checklist.name: Skip option present
checklist.description: OrderConfirmationPage.jsx includes a 'No thanks' (or equivalent) button/link that allows the customer to dismiss the account creation prompt without creating an account

checklist.name: Prompt only shown with token
checklist.description: The account creation prompt in OrderConfirmationPage.jsx is only rendered when accountCreationToken is present (not shown if the prop is absent/null)

checklist.name: Order tracking by email+number
checklist.description: The trackGuestOrder handler accepts orderNumber and email as inputs and looks up the order using both (not requiring authentication)

checklist.name: Tracking OR condition
checklist.description: The order lookup in trackGuestOrder matches either guestEmail OR the email of an associated user account — so orders that have been claimed by an account are still findable

checklist.name: autoComplete new-password
checklist.description: The password input in OrderConfirmationPage.jsx has autoComplete="new-password" set
